item.title: SkySports_Keith: Keith Downie @SkySports_Keith · 3min Anthony Gordon has NOT told Newcastle United he wants to leave — but there IS an e
item.description: Keith Downie @SkySports_Keith · 3min Anthony Gordon has NOT told Newcastle United he wants to leave — but there IS an expectation from the club that the forward would be keen on a move away from the club this summer. Sky Sports News can exclusively reveal that Bayern Munich have been tracking Gordon since Mostrar más skysports.com Anthony Gordon, Sandro Tonali and Tino Livramento: Newcastle trio could leave in summer transfer... Newcastle and England winger Anthony Gordon has been tracked by Bayern Munich since the start of the year; Gordon has Magpies contract until 2030 and has not told club he wants to leave; Sandro... 8 17 59 2 mil

item.title: SamiMokbel_BBC: Sami Mokbel @SamiMokbel_BBC · 8min Exc: Interview with departed Arsenal technical director James Ellis on his sudden dep
item.description: Sami Mokbel @SamiMokbel_BBC · 8min Exc: Interview with departed Arsenal technical director James Ellis on his sudden departure, working under Edu and Andrea Berta and his aim for a swift return to work. De bbc.co.uk 2 15 80 4 mil
